channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: LA Student Accepted to 65 Colleges, Chooses Columbia
item.description: Lamont Newell, a 17-year-old student, was accepted to 65 colleges and awarded over $1 million in scholarships.

item.title: GOP Redistricting Causes Voter Confusion, Election Challenges
Pediatricians recommend regular recess for children's health
Transportation Secretary's road trip series faces criticism
item.description: Sean Duffy, the Transportation Secretary, and his family are featured in a new YouTube reality series.
